# Generated by tools/generate_plane_role_licensing.py.
# Small-airframe variants are created independently by role and strongest constructible profile.

DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_small = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } } }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Fighter 1936 C"
						type = small_plane_airframe_1
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = heavy_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = light_mg_4x
							engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = armor_plate_small
							special_type_slot_2 = fuel_tanks_small
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 } }
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "Fighter 1936 C"
			type = small_plane_airframe_1
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = heavy_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = light_mg_4x
				engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x
				special_type_slot_1 = armor_plate_small
				special_type_slot_2 = fuel_tanks_small
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = {
	DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_c
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter profile=C variant=Fighter 1936 C source=real_tech"
	}
	else = {
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter profile=C variant=Fighter 1936 C source=licensed_frame"
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter profile=C variant=Fighter 1936 C"
	}
}

DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_small = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } } }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Fighter 1936 B"
						type = small_plane_airframe_1
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = light_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = light_mg_4x
							engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 } }
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "Fighter 1936 B"
			type = small_plane_airframe_1
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = light_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = light_mg_4x
				engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = {
	DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_b
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter profile=B variant=Fighter 1936 B source=real_tech"
	}
	else = {
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter profile=B variant=Fighter 1936 B source=licensed_frame"
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter profile=B variant=Fighter 1936 B"
	}
	log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_PROFILE_FALLBACK | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter profile=B better_engine=engines_2 missing_profile=C"
}

DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_small = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } } }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Fighter 1936 A"
						type = small_plane_airframe_1
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = light_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = light_mg_4x
							engine_type_slot = engine_1_1x
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 } }
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "Fighter 1936 A"
			type = small_plane_airframe_1
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = light_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = light_mg_4x
				engine_type_slot = engine_1_1x
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = {
	DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_a
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter profile=A variant=Fighter 1936 A source=real_tech"
	}
	else = {
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter profile=A variant=Fighter 1936 A source=licensed_frame"
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter profile=A variant=Fighter 1936 A"
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = engines_2 }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_PROFILE_FALLBACK | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter profile=A better_engine=engines_2 missing_profiles=C,B"
	}
}

DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_cas_c_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_small = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } } }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "CAS 1936 C"
						type = small_plane_cas_airframe_1
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = bomb_locks
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = dive_brakes_small
							special_type_slot_2 = fuel_tanks_small
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 } }
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "CAS 1936 C"
			type = small_plane_cas_airframe_1
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = bomb_locks
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
				engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x
				special_type_slot_1 = dive_brakes_small
				special_type_slot_2 = fuel_tanks_small
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_cas_c_design = {
	DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_c
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas profile=C variant=CAS 1936 C source=real_tech"
	}
	else = {
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas profile=C variant=CAS 1936 C source=licensed_frame"
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas profile=C variant=CAS 1936 C"
	}
}

	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }

						parent_version = 0

						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = bomb_locks
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }

				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
				engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x

DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_cas_a_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_small = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } } }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "CAS 1936 A"
						type = small_plane_cas_airframe_1
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = bomb_locks
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_1_1x
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 } }
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "CAS 1936 A"
			type = small_plane_cas_airframe_1
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = bomb_locks
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
				engine_type_slot = engine_1_1x
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_cas_a_design = {
	DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_cas_a_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_a
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas profile=A variant=CAS 1936 A source=real_tech"
	}
	else = {
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas profile=A variant=CAS 1936 A source=licensed_frame"
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas profile=A variant=CAS 1936 A"
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = engines_2 }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_PROFILE_FALLBACK | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas profile=A better_engine=engines_2 missing_profiles=C,B"
	}
}

DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_naval_small = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } } }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Naval Bomber 1936 C"
						type = small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_1
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = drop_tanks
							special_type_slot_2 = fuel_tanks_small
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 } }
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "Naval Bomber 1936 C"
			type = small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_1
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
				engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x
				special_type_slot_1 = drop_tanks
				special_type_slot_2 = fuel_tanks_small
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = {
	DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_c
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber profile=C variant=Naval Bomber 1936 C source=real_tech"
	}
	else = {
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber profile=C variant=Naval Bomber 1936 C source=licensed_frame"
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber profile=C variant=Naval Bomber 1936 C"
	}
}

DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_naval_small = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } } }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Naval Bomber 1936 B"
						type = small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_1
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 } }
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "Naval Bomber 1936 B"
			type = small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_1
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
				engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x
			}
		}
	}
}

	DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_b
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber profile=B variant=Naval Bomber 1936 B source=real_tech"
	}
	else = {
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber profile=B variant=Naval Bomber 1936 B source=licensed_frame"

	}
	log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_PROFILE_FALLBACK | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber profile=B better_engine=engines_2 missing_profile=C"
}

DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_naval_small = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } } }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Naval Bomber 1936 A"
						type = small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_1
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_1_1x
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 } }
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "Naval Bomber 1936 A"
			type = small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_1
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
				engine_type_slot = engine_1_1x
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_design = {
	DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_a
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber profile=A variant=Naval Bomber 1936 A source=real_tech"
	}
	else = {
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber profile=A variant=Naval Bomber 1936 A source=licensed_frame"
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber profile=A variant=Naval Bomber 1936 A"
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = engines_2 }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_PROFILE_FALLBACK | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber profile=A better_engine=engines_2 missing_profiles=C,B"
	}
}

DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_naval_small = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } } }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Carrier Fighter 1936 C"
						type = cv_small_plane_airframe_1
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = heavy_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = light_mg_2x
							engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = armor_plate_small
							special_type_slot_2 = armor_plate_small
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 } }
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "Carrier Fighter 1936 C"
			type = cv_small_plane_airframe_1
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = heavy_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = light_mg_2x
				engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x
				special_type_slot_1 = armor_plate_small
				special_type_slot_2 = armor_plate_small
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = {
	DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_c
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter profile=C variant=Carrier Fighter 1936 C source=real_tech"
	}
	else = {
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter profile=C variant=Carrier Fighter 1936 C source=licensed_frame"
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter profile=C variant=Carrier Fighter 1936 C"
	}
}

DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_naval_small = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } } }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Carrier Fighter 1936 B"
						type = cv_small_plane_airframe_1
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = light_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = light_mg_2x
							engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 } }
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "Carrier Fighter 1936 B"
			type = cv_small_plane_airframe_1
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = light_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = light_mg_2x
				engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design = {
	DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_b
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter profile=B variant=Carrier Fighter 1936 B source=real_tech"
	}
	else = {
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter profile=B variant=Carrier Fighter 1936 B source=licensed_frame"
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter profile=B variant=Carrier Fighter 1936 B"
	}
	log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_PROFILE_FALLBACK | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter profile=B better_engine=engines_2 missing_profile=C"
}

DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_naval_small = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } } }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Carrier Fighter 1936 A"
						type = cv_small_plane_airframe_1
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = light_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = light_mg_2x
							engine_type_slot = engine_1_1x
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 } }
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "Carrier Fighter 1936 A"
			type = cv_small_plane_airframe_1
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = light_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = light_mg_2x
				engine_type_slot = engine_1_1x
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design = {
	DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_a
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter profile=A variant=Carrier Fighter 1936 A source=real_tech"
	}
	else = {
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter profile=A variant=Carrier Fighter 1936 A source=licensed_frame"
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter profile=A variant=Carrier Fighter 1936 A"
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = engines_2 }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_PROFILE_FALLBACK | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter profile=A better_engine=engines_2 missing_profiles=C,B"
	}
}

DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_naval_small = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } } }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Carrier Naval Bomber 1936 C"
						type = cv_small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_1
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = self_sealing_fuel_tanks_small
							special_type_slot_2 = armor_plate_small
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 } }
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "Carrier Naval Bomber 1936 C"
			type = cv_small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_1
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
				engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x
				special_type_slot_1 = self_sealing_fuel_tanks_small
				special_type_slot_2 = armor_plate_small
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = {
	DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_c
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=C variant=Carrier Naval Bomber 1936 C source=real_tech"
	}
	else = {
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=C variant=Carrier Naval Bomber 1936 C source=licensed_frame"
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=C variant=Carrier Naval Bomber 1936 C"
	}
}

DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_naval_small = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } } }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Carrier Naval Bomber 1936 B"
						type = cv_small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_1
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 } }
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "Carrier Naval Bomber 1936 B"
			type = cv_small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_1
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
				engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design = {
	DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_b
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=B variant=Carrier Naval Bomber 1936 B source=real_tech"
	}
	else = {
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=B variant=Carrier Naval Bomber 1936 B source=licensed_frame"
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=B variant=Carrier Naval Bomber 1936 B"
	}
	log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_PROFILE_FALLBACK | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=B better_engine=engines_2 missing_profile=C"
}

DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_naval_small = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } } }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Carrier Naval Bomber 1936 A"
						type = cv_small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_1
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_1_1x
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 } }
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "Carrier Naval Bomber 1936 A"
			type = cv_small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_1
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
				engine_type_slot = engine_1_1x
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design = {
	DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_a
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=A variant=Carrier Naval Bomber 1936 A source=real_tech"
	}
	else = {
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=A variant=Carrier Naval Bomber 1936 A source=licensed_frame"
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=A variant=Carrier Naval Bomber 1936 A"
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = engines_2 }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_PROFILE_FALLBACK | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=A better_engine=engines_2 missing_profiles=C,B"
	}
}

DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_role_designs = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			any_other_country = {
				DAI_is_ai_license_partner_of_root = yes
				DAI_needs_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_from_root = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_full_c
					has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_full
				}
				NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_c }
			}
			set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_c
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_engine_b
					has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_engine
				}
				NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_b }
			}
			set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_b
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_base
				}
				NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_a }
			}
			set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_a
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
				NOT = {
					OR = {
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_fighter_c_profile = yes
					}
				}
			}
			DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes
				NOT = {
					OR = {
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_fighter_c_profile = yes
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_fighter_b_profile = yes
					}
				}
			}
			DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = yes
				NOT = {
					OR = {
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_fighter_c_profile = yes
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_fighter_b_profile = yes
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_fighter_a_profile = yes
					}
				}
			}
			DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = yes
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			any_other_country = {
				DAI_is_ai_license_partner_of_root = yes
				DAI_needs_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_from_root = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_full_c
					has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_full
				}
				NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_c }
			}
			set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_c
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_engine_b
					has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_engine
				}
				NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_b }
			}
			set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_b
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_base
				}
				NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_a }
			}
			set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_a
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
				NOT = {
					OR = {
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_cas_c_profile = yes
					}
				}
			}
			DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_cas_b_design = yes
				NOT = {
					OR = {
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_cas_c_profile = yes
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_cas_b_profile = yes
					}
				}
			}
			DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_cas_b_design = yes
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_cas_a_design = yes
				NOT = {
					OR = {
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_cas_c_profile = yes
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_cas_b_profile = yes
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_cas_a_profile = yes
					}
				}
			}
			DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_cas_a_design = yes
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			any_other_country = {
				DAI_is_ai_license_partner_of_root = yes
				DAI_needs_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_from_root = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_full_c
					has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_full
				}
				NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_c }
			}
			set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_c
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_engine_b
					has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_engine
				}
				NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_b }
			}
			set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_b
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_base
				}
				NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_a }
			}
			set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_a
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
				NOT = {
					OR = {
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_profile = yes
					}
				}
			}
			DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
				NOT = {
					OR = {
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_profile = yes
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_profile = yes
					}
				}
			}
			DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
				NOT = {
					OR = {
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_profile = yes
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_profile = yes
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_profile = yes
					}
				}
			}
			DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			any_other_country = {
				DAI_is_ai_license_partner_of_root = yes
				DAI_needs_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_from_root = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_full_c
					has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_full
				}
				NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_c }
			}
			set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_c
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_engine_b
					has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_engine
				}
				NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_b }
			}
			set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_b
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_base
				}
				NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_a }
			}
			set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_a
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = yes
				NOT = {
					OR = {
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_profile = yes
					}
				}
			}
			DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = yes
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design = yes
				NOT = {
					OR = {
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_profile = yes
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_profile = yes
					}
				}
			}
			DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design = yes
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design = yes
				NOT = {
					OR = {
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_profile = yes
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_profile = yes
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_profile = yes
					}
				}
			}
			DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design = yes
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			any_other_country = {
				DAI_is_ai_license_partner_of_root = yes
				DAI_needs_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_from_root = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_full_c
					has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_full
				}
				NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_c }
			}
			set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_c
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_engine_b
					has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_engine
				}
				NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_b }
			}
			set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_b
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_design_base
				}
				NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_a }
			}
			set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_a
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
				NOT = {
					OR = {
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_profile = yes
					}
				}
			}
			DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
				NOT = {
					OR = {
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_profile = yes
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_profile = yes
					}
				}
			}
			DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
				NOT = {
					OR = {
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_profile = yes
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_profile = yes
						DAI_has_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_profile = yes
					}
				}
			}
			DAI_create_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
		}
	}
}

DAI_build_improved_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_small = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } } }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Fighter 1940 C"
						type = small_plane_airframe_2
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = heavy_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = heavy_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = light_mg_4x
							engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = armor_plate_small
							special_type_slot_2 = armor_plate_small
							special_type_slot_3 = fuel_tanks_small
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 } }
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "Fighter 1940 C"
			type = small_plane_airframe_2
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = heavy_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = heavy_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = light_mg_4x
				engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
				special_type_slot_1 = armor_plate_small
				special_type_slot_2 = armor_plate_small
				special_type_slot_3 = fuel_tanks_small
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_improved_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = {
	DAI_build_improved_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_design_c
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = improved_small_airframe }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter profile=C variant=Fighter 1940 C source=real_tech"
	}
	else = {
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter profile=C variant=Fighter 1940 C source=licensed_frame"
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter profile=C variant=Fighter 1940 C"
	}
}

DAI_build_improved_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_small = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } } }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Fighter 1940 B"
						type = small_plane_airframe_2
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = light_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = light_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = light_mg_4x
							engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 } }
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "Fighter 1940 B"
			type = small_plane_airframe_2
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = light_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = light_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = light_mg_4x
				engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_improved_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = {
	DAI_build_improved_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_design_b
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = improved_small_airframe }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter profile=B variant=Fighter 1940 B source=real_tech"
	}
	else = {
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter profile=B variant=Fighter 1940 B source=licensed_frame"
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter profile=B variant=Fighter 1940 B"
	}
	log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_PROFILE_FALLBACK | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter profile=B better_engine=engines_3 missing_profile=C"
}

DAI_build_improved_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_small = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } } }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Fighter 1940 A"
						type = small_plane_airframe_2
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = light_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = light_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = light_mg_4x
							engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 } }
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "Fighter 1940 A"
			type = small_plane_airframe_2
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = light_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = light_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = light_mg_4x
				engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_improved_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = {
	DAI_build_improved_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_design_a
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = improved_small_airframe }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter profile=A variant=Fighter 1940 A source=real_tech"
	}
	else = {
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter profile=A variant=Fighter 1940 A source=licensed_frame"
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter profile=A variant=Fighter 1940 A"
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = engines_3 }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_PROFILE_FALLBACK | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter profile=A better_engine=engines_3 missing_profiles=C,B"
	}
}

DAI_build_improved_small_airframe_cas_c_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_small = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } } }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "CAS 1940 C"
						type = small_plane_cas_airframe_2
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = tank_buster_1
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = bomb_locks
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = armor_plate_small
							special_type_slot_2 = dive_brakes_small
							special_type_slot_3 = fuel_tanks_small
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 } }
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "CAS 1940 C"
			type = small_plane_cas_airframe_2
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = tank_buster_1
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = bomb_locks
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
				engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
				special_type_slot_1 = armor_plate_small
				special_type_slot_2 = dive_brakes_small
				special_type_slot_3 = fuel_tanks_small
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_improved_small_airframe_cas_c_design = {
	DAI_build_improved_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_cas_design_c
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = improved_small_airframe }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=cas profile=C variant=CAS 1940 C source=real_tech"
	}
	else = {
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=cas profile=C variant=CAS 1940 C source=licensed_frame"
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=cas profile=C variant=CAS 1940 C"
	}
}

DAI_build_improved_small_airframe_cas_b_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_small = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } } }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "CAS 1940 B"
						type = small_plane_cas_airframe_2
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = bomb_locks
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = bomb_locks
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 } }
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "CAS 1940 B"
			type = small_plane_cas_airframe_2
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = bomb_locks
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = bomb_locks
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
				engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_improved_small_airframe_cas_b_design = {
	DAI_build_improved_small_airframe_cas_b_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_cas_design_b
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = improved_small_airframe }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=cas profile=B variant=CAS 1940 B source=real_tech"
	}
	else = {

		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=cas profile=B variant=CAS 1940 B"
	}
	log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_PROFILE_FALLBACK | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=cas profile=B better_engine=engines_3 missing_profile=C"
}

DAI_build_improved_small_airframe_cas_a_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_small = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } } }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "CAS 1940 A"
						type = small_plane_cas_airframe_2
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = bomb_locks
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = bomb_locks
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 } }
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "CAS 1940 A"
			type = small_plane_cas_airframe_2
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = bomb_locks
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = bomb_locks
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
				engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_improved_small_airframe_cas_a_design = {
	DAI_build_improved_small_airframe_cas_a_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_cas_design_a
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = improved_small_airframe }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=cas profile=A variant=CAS 1940 A source=real_tech"
	}
	else = {
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=cas profile=A variant=CAS 1940 A source=licensed_frame"
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=cas profile=A variant=CAS 1940 A"
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = engines_3 }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_PROFILE_FALLBACK | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=cas profile=A better_engine=engines_3 missing_profiles=C,B"
	}
}

DAI_build_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_naval_small = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } } }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Naval Bomber 1940 C"
						type = small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_2
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting_3
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = drop_tanks
							special_type_slot_2 = fuel_tanks_small
							special_type_slot_3 = fuel_tanks_small
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 } }
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "Naval Bomber 1940 C"
			type = small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_2
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting_3
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
				engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
				special_type_slot_1 = drop_tanks
				special_type_slot_2 = fuel_tanks_small
				special_type_slot_3 = fuel_tanks_small
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = {
	DAI_build_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_c
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = improved_small_airframe }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=naval_bomber profile=C variant=Naval Bomber 1940 C source=real_tech"
	}
	else = {
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=naval_bomber profile=C variant=Naval Bomber 1940 C source=licensed_frame"
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=naval_bomber profile=C variant=Naval Bomber 1940 C"
	}
}

DAI_build_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_naval_small = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } } }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Naval Bomber 1940 B"
						type = small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_2
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 } }
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "Naval Bomber 1940 B"
			type = small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_2
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
				engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
			}
		}
	}
}

	DAI_set_air_design_team_naval_small = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } } }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Naval Bomber 1940 A"
						type = small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_2
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 } }
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "Naval Bomber 1940 A"
			type = small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_2
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
				engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_build_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_naval_small = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } } }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Carrier Fighter 1940 C"
						type = cv_small_plane_airframe_2
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = heavy_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = heavy_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = light_mg_2x
							engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = self_sealing_fuel_tanks_small
							special_type_slot_2 = armor_plate_small
							special_type_slot_3 = armor_plate_small
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 } }
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "Carrier Fighter 1940 C"
			type = cv_small_plane_airframe_2
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = heavy_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = heavy_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = light_mg_2x
				engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
				special_type_slot_1 = self_sealing_fuel_tanks_small
				special_type_slot_2 = armor_plate_small
				special_type_slot_3 = armor_plate_small
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_create_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = {
	DAI_build_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_c
	if = {
		limit = { has_tech = improved_small_airframe }
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=carrier_fighter profile=C variant=Carrier Fighter 1940 C source=real_tech"
	}
	else = {
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=carrier_fighter profile=C variant=Carrier Fighter 1940 C source=licensed_frame"
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_REEXPORT_CREATE | provider=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=carrier_fighter profile=C variant=Carrier Fighter 1940 C"

			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {

					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Carrier Fighter 1940 B"
						type = cv_small_plane_airframe_2
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = light_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = light_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = light_mg_2x
							engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}

			name = "Carrier Fighter 1940 B"
			type = cv_small_plane_airframe_2
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = light_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = light_mg_4x
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = light_mg_2x
				engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
			}
		}
	}

			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {

					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Carrier Fighter 1940 A"
						type = cv_small_plane_airframe_2
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = light_mg_4x
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = light_mg_4x

							engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {

			name = "Carrier Fighter 1940 A"
			type = cv_small_plane_airframe_2

			modules = {

				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = light_mg_2x
				engine_type_slot = engine_2_1x
			}

	}

DAI_build_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = {
	DAI_set_air_design_team_naval_small = yes
	set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } } }
		meta_effect = {
			text = {
				if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team = 0 } }
						mio:[x] = { is_mio_available = yes }
					}
					create_equipment_variant = {
						name = "Carrier Naval Bomber 1940 C"
						type = cv_small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_2
						parent_version = 0
						allow_without_tech = yes
						design_team = mio:[x]
						modules = {
							fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting_3
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
							fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
							engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
							special_type_slot_1 = self_sealing_fuel_tanks_small
							special_type_slot_2 = armor_plate_small
							special_type_slot_3 = armor_plate_small
						}
					}
					set_temp_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 1 }
				}
			}
			x = "[?DAI_air_design_team.GetTokenKey]"
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = { check_variable = { DAI_air_design_team_added = 0 } }
		create_equipment_variant = {
			name = "Carrier Naval Bomber 1940 C"
			type = cv_small_plane_naval_bomber_airframe_2
			parent_version = 0
			allow_without_tech = yes
			modules = {
				fixed_main_weapon_slot = torpedo_mounting_3
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1 = empty
				fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2 = empty
				engine_type_slot = engine_3_1x
				special_type_slot_1 = self_sealing_fuel_tanks_small
				special_type_slot_2 = armor_plate_small
				special_type_slot_3 = armor_plate_small
			}
		}
	}
}
